index.cta.lead: Join thousands of doctors who are already transforming how they study with the region’s most advanced platform.
index.cta.title: Ready to secure your spot?
index.features.c1p: Detailed explanations for every answer so you understand the “why” behind each option.
index.features.c2p: Track performance with stats that highlight strengths and topics to improve.
index.features.c3p: Practice with exams that mirror official testing conditions.
index.features.lead: Expert-designed tools to optimize study time and boost your results.
index.features.title: Everything you need to succeed
index.footer.brand: Training specialists with cutting-edge technology and high-quality medical content.
index.footer.cta_sub: Write to us or log in. We answer questions about access, subjects, and billing.
index.footer.legal_cookies_p: We use cookies necessary for the site to work; you can adjust preferences in your browser.
index.footer.legal_lgpd_p: We comply with personal data protection (Law No. 13.709/2018 and equivalent principles in the region).
index.footer.legal_privacy_p: We process personal data in line with our privacy policy and applicable regulations.
index.footer.legal_terms_p: BancodeChoices services are offered under the site’s general terms of use. Access implies acceptance of these conditions.
index.footer.trust_line: Personal data handled securely and transparently, only for the stated purposes.
index.hero.alt: Abstract medical visualization in purple tones
index.hero.lead: Prepare with a platform that combines medical content and progress tracking. Commented questions to help you grow with confidence.
index.hero.title: Master medicine with commented questions

index.lp.bento.stats_p: See performance by subject and trends in the dashboard and stats page after each session.

signup.alert.min_materias: Select at least one subject to continue.
signup.checkout.after_pay_note: After payment: you’ll receive an email with your username and password to sign in.
signup.checkout.mp_redirect_hint: After you pay, Mercado Pago usually brings you back here. If that doesn’t happen, use the link on their screen to return or open Banco de Choices in a new tab — your access will still go through as usual.
signup.checkout.email_hint: Email for account access and confirmation
signup.checkout.mp_info: You’ll be redirected to Mercado Pago to complete payment securely
signup.checkout.name: Full name
signup.checkout.terms_label: I have read and accept the terms and conditions.
signup.empty.p: Please come back later or contact support if you think this is an error.
signup.empty.title: No subjects available right now.
signup.err.min_materias: Select at least one subject to continue.
signup.err.payment_failed: Payment could not be completed. Please try again.
signup.err.checkout_no_draft: We couldn’t find this order in your session. Go back, pick subjects and plan again, then retry.
signup.err.checkout_draft_expired: This checkout expired (over 2 hours). Start again from subject selection.
signup.err.checkout_order_mismatch: The order id doesn’t match your session. Refresh the page or go back one step.
signup.err.checkout_invalid_plan: The plan data isn’t valid. Go back and choose a plan again.
signup.err.checkout_duration_mismatch: The plan duration doesn’t match. Refresh and try again.
signup.err.checkout_materias_invalid: The subjects sent are invalid. Go back and select again.
signup.err.checkout_materias_mismatch: Subjects don’t match what you selected. Go back one step.
signup.err.checkout_price_mismatch: The total doesn’t match the plan. Refresh or pick the plan again.
signup.err.checkout_draft_total_mismatch: The total doesn’t match what was calculated. Refresh the page.
signup.err.checkout_plan_draft_mismatch: The plan doesn’t match the draft. Go back and choose the plan again.
signup.err.checkout_user_mismatch: The session doesn’t match your user. Open checkout again.
signup.err.checkout_unit_price_mismatch: The unit price changed. Refresh the page and try again.
signup.err.checkout_not_logged_in: Your session expired. Sign in again and retry.
signup.err.checkout_plan_not_found: Plan not found. Return to the plan step.
signup.err.mercadopago_not_configured: Payment is temporarily unavailable: Mercado Pago credentials are not configured on the server. Contact support.
signup.err.mercadopago_preference_failed: We couldn’t start checkout with Mercado Pago. Try again in a few minutes. If it continues, contact support.
signup.err.payment_unknown: We couldn’t identify the payment result. If you already paid, wait for email confirmation.
signup.how1.p: Tap each card to include it. You can add as many as you need.
signup.how1.title: Select subjects
signup.how2.p: On the next screen you set how long access lasts (months or year).
signup.how2.title: Choose the plan
signup.how3.p: You’ll be redirected to Mercado Pago. When payment clears, we unlock your account.
signup.how3.title: Pay securely
signup.materia.hint.bio: Genetics, cell biology, and molecular foundations.
signup.materia.hint.default: Full access to this subject’s bank.
signup.materias.lead_after: you want the bank (1 month, 6 months, or 1 year), then complete payment with Mercado Pago.
signup.materias.lead_before: Select one or more areas: in the next step you’ll choose
signup.materias.tip: Tip: if you’re torn between two subjects, you can select both and adjust study time later in your dashboard.
signup.materias.what_p: You only choose which content you want to study. The total price depends on how many subjects you pick and the duration plan you choose later — you don’t need to decide that yet.
signup.materias.what_title: What do you do in this step?
signup.page_title.materias: Choose your subjects | Banco de Choices
signup.payment.error_tip2: • Check that your details are correct
signup.payment.error_tip3: • Contact support if the problem continues
signup.payment.next1: 1. If payment was approved, you’ll receive your credentials by email (check spam).
signup.payment.next2: 2. If payment is pending (e.g. cash), we’ll notify you when it clears.
signup.payment.next3: 3. You can sign in when you receive the email with your password.
signup.payment.processing_p: We’re confirming payment with Mercado Pago. We don’t show passwords on this screen for security: access is unlocked when payment is approved in our system (official notification).
signup.payment.synced_note: We confirmed the payment status with Mercado Pago. If the email hasn’t arrived yet, check your spam folder.
signup.payment.unknown_h1: We couldn’t confirm the result on this page
signup.payment.unknown_p: If you completed payment, wait for the access email or try signing in. Contact support if you need help.
signup.payment.after_mp_screen: If Mercado Pago didn’t show a button to return to our site, use the same browser where you started checkout and open the link below to save your access in our database.
